title: lygodium smithianum
intro: Lygodium smithianum, also known as the Australian climbing fern, is a species of fern native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lygodium smithianum include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Lygodium smithianum can be prepared as a decoction by infusing the fronds in hot water, or as a tincture by soaking the plant material in a solvent.
